title: thelypteris prismatica
intro: Thelypteris prismatica, also known as the slender lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris prismatica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract in tincture form.
